task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Rancher interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher dashboard is visible in the web browser with the URL pointing to https://localhost.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the target deployment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI shows the 'sftp-worker' deployment details or edit screen within the 'batch-jobs' namespace.

task_completion.description: Agent configured a volume (or volumes) to include both the Secret and ConfigMap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI or YAML view shows a projected volume combining the 'sftp-key' Secret and 'sftp-config' ConfigMap, OR separate volumes configured for each.

task_completion.description: Agent set the correct file paths and specific 0400 permissions for the private key.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UI or YAML configuration explicitly shows 'id_rsa' with a mode of 0400 (or 256 in decimal) and 'known_hosts' included in the volume items.

task_completion.description: Agent mounted the volume(s) to the correct directory in the container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Volume Mounts section in the UI or YAML shows the configured volume(s) mapped to the mount path '/home/worker/.ssh/'.

task_completion.description: The deployment successfully updated and the pod reached a stable Running state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI shows the 'sftp-worker' deployment as active, with the pod status indicator showing green/Running.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher UI or kubectl terminal commands to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual Rancher web interface or a terminal executing kubectl commands, rather than just typing text into a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The deployment changes were actually applied and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Upgrade' button was clicked in the Rancher UI, or a 'kubectl apply' / 'kubectl edit' command was successfully executed in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent modified the existing deployment in the correct namespace rather than creating a workaround.
integrity.visual_evidence: The namespace remains 'batch-jobs' and the deployment name remains 'sftp-worker' throughout the configuration process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace is 'batch-jobs'. Target deployment is 'sftp-worker'. The task requires mounting 'id_rsa' from the 'sftp-key' Secret (with 0400 permissions) and 'known_hosts' from the 'sftp-config' ConfigMap into the container path '/home/worker/.ssh/'.
